name: Soundstack Visualizer
description: Audio-reactive visualizations overlaid on any page. On live365 station pages, replaces the hero image.

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-same-origin; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:;
